description: Strict schema for the payload of every vector stored in Qdrant (src/shared/models/embedding_payload.py). Pydantic BaseModel. The docstring explicitly claims 'strict schema' — this contract formalizes that claim constitutionally. Every stored vector must carry this payload to ensure all knowledge is traceable to its origin. All required fields use Pydantic Field(...) with no default — absence at construction time raises a validation error. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path of the source file. Required.

chunk_id.description: Stable locator for the text chunk (e.g., symbol key). Required.

content_sha256.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the normalized chunk text. Required.

model.description: Name of the embedding model used. Required.

model_rev.description: Pinned revision of the embedding model. Required.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of vector creation. Required.

language.description: Programming or markup language (str | None). Optional.

symbol.description: For code: fully qualified function/class name (str | None). Optional.

text.description: Raw text content of the chunk, for display and retrieval (str | None). Optional.
